name: m18-qdrant-payload-maintenance-batch-refresh
title: M18 Qdrant Payload Maintenance Batch Refresh
description: Plan batch-capable Qdrant payload refresh for reused points while preserving point-incremental rebuild safety and per-point fallback compatibility.
creator: suixingchen
notes: M18 follows M15/M17: optimize reused-point payload refresh call count without changing vector writes, stale-delete ordering, or local WAVE-RAG search semantics.
